name: SkillSight: Seeing Through Shared Descriptions for Accurate Skill Retrieval

description: arXiv:2607.18785v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: As large language model agents gain access to increasingly large skill libraries, retrieving the right skill becomes critical to reliable capability selection and execution. Existing retrievers often treat skill descriptions as ordinary documents, overlooking their highly regular structure: shared descriptive patterns recur across many skills whil...
author: Jinying Xiao, Bin Ji, Shasha Li, Xiaodong Liu, Ma Jun, Jiacheng Jie, Chao Wang, Nyima Tashi, Jie Yu
